subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, for having rent asunder the veil, torn away the shroud and kindled the lamp of guidance within the hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما کشفت الغطاء و هتکت الحجاب و اوقدت سراج الهدی فی قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @events in the life and ministry of the Bab, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @literal interpretation, @review of publications
